title: Ibn al-Zubayr's Demolition of the Kacbah
description: According to Mubammad b. cUmar al-Wagidi- Ibrahim b. Musa-. -Ikrimah b. Khalid: Ibn al-Zubayr demolished the.sanc478. Literally, " it is not your nest." 479. See n. 400.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 20
